mapper.select: /* OrderNisCnlSendMapper.xml selectOrderNisCnlList */ SELECT HD.SOHDKEY , HD.ORGORDERKEY , HD.CLAIMNO , DT.ICKEY , DT.OLNICKEY , DT.INITQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT DT ON HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.SOHDKEY = DT.SOHDKEY WHERE HD.OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND HD.WKSTATUS = '20' AND HD.NISYN = 'Y' AND HD.NISSNDYN = 'N' AND HD.ORDERTYPECD IN ('90','100') AND HD.ORDERISTDAY BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND (HD.OWKEY, HD.SOHDKEY) IN ( SELECT OWKEY, SOHDKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT GROUP BY OWKEY, SOHDKEY HAVING SUM(COALESCE(CNFRMQTY, 0)) = 0 )
